def positive_property_returns_live_internal_cache_object():
    rule_id = "property_returns_live_internal_cache_object"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag properties that expose live mutable cache objects directly to callers."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
